-- 1 of 17 --

Inner Game vs. Outer Game
▪ 	Outer game is everything that happens outside yourself -
this is where most people focus:
▪ 	What camera should I use?
▪ 	What microphone should I use?
▪ 	Where should I host my video?
▪ 	But it’s not as important as the Inner Game…
BONUS - OPERATION QUICK START
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 17 --

Inner Game vs. Outer Game
▪ 	Inner game…
▪ 	Happens between your ears
▪ 	It’s more important to shoot video than to have the
right camera
▪ 	But that requires having your head together
BONUS - OPERATION QUICK START
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 17 --

Why Inner game is EVERYTHING
▪ 	Business is about creation - everything is created in the
mind first
▪ 	You will have ups and downs - everyone does - expect it
▪ 	You have to expect big things - and forgive yourself when
you miss
BONUS - OPERATION QUICK START
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 17 --

▪ 	You don’t need to be perfect
▪ 	Don’t expect to have everything figured out before you
start

Successful People have a bias toward action
▪ 	You will make mistakes and have false starts - we all do
▪ 	If you don’t decide - you’ve made a decision - the decision
is to stay where you are
▪ 	The plan is never complete
▪ 	“Man plans, God laughs”

-- 9 of 17 --

The Plan is never complete
▪ 	I started off with a stock newsletter - I never thought it
would change the business world
▪ 	You course correct and you get closer and closer to the
goal
▪ 	Unless you take action, you can’t course correct
▪ 	Successful people have a bias towards action
BONUS - OPERATION QUICK START

Protect Your Confidence
▪ 	There will be dream stealers - you need to keep them out
of your life
▪ 	Some will do it with good intentions
▪ 	Many will be jealous

-- 11 of 17 --

Protect Your Confidence
▪ 	Reality: Many people are NOT going to take action to
create a better life
▪ 	When they see you doing it, it makes them face that
reality
▪ 	So they want to see you quit

Protect Your Confidence
▪ 	Share your plans with people who will be your
champions (not to everyone)
▪ 	Listen to people with experience - not people who have no
experience
▪ 	I had people tell me my plans wouldn’t work
